legalReview.by: EXEMPLAR ONLY - engineering placeholder pending attorney review

body.heading: Declaration
body.text: I, {{testatorName}}, a resident of {{county}} County, California, being of sound mind and not acting under duress, menace, fraud, or undue influence, declare this to be my last will and testament, and I revoke all prior wills and codicils.

body.heading: Appointment of Executor
body.text: I nominate {{executorName}} to serve as executor of this will, to serve without bond.

body.heading: Alternate Executor
body.text: If {{executorName}} is unable or unwilling to serve, I nominate {{alternateExecutorName}} to serve as executor, to serve without bond.

body.heading: Guardianship of Minor Children
body.text: If at my death any of my children are minors and a guardian is needed, I nominate {{guardianName}} as guardian of the person and estate of each such minor child.

body.heading: Residuary Estate
body.text: I give the residue of my estate, real and personal, wherever situated, to {{residuaryBeneficiaryName}}.

body.heading: Execution
body.text:
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I sign this will in the presence of the witnesses below, each of whom signs at my request, in my presence, and in the presence of each other.

California law requires this will to be signed by at least two witnesses, each of whom is present at the same time and understands that this instrument is the testator's will.
